summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PerformOS One-on-One Builder V2 with weekly scheduling system and dual rating+comment inputs. Backend API testing achieved 86.7% success rate with all core functionality working. Frontend serves React application correctly with PerformOS V2 styling and components.
